YearMonth.description: Gets or sets the reporting period expressed as an integer in format YYYYMM (e.g. 202501 for January 2025).

DeviationAmount.description: Gets or sets the total deviation amount, i.e. the sum of all deviations for the reporting period.

SocialFee.description: Gets or sets the employer social fee (payroll taxes) for the period.

GrossSalary.description: Gets or sets the gross salary (before deductions) for the period.

NetSalary.description: Gets or sets the net salary (after deductions) to be paid for the period.

DisablePayslip.description: Gets or sets the disable payslip indicator for this period

WintSalary.Report.WintSalaryReportListIt.description: Represents a single salary report row for a specific person and reporting period (year/month).

PersonId.description: Person Id associated with this row.

Description.description: Description text associated with the row.

Children.description: Collection of child rows under current row in Wint salary report.

Columns.description: Columns current row has in Wint salary report.

WintSalary.Report.WintSalaryReportRow.description: Represents a row in the Wint salary report.

IsAlreadyApproved.description: Indicates whether the salary month is already approved or not.

StartDate.description: Start date related to the row.

EndDate.description: End date related to the row.

WorkedHours.description: Value reported under deviation type category Worked Hours / Arbetstid

AbsenceDurationInHours.description: Day minutes sum as hours reported under deviation type category Absence / Frånvaro

AbsenceDurationInDays.description: Day minutes sum as days reported under deviation type category Absence / Frånvaro

TimeBalancesHours.description: Value reported under deviation type category time balances / Tidssaldo

CompensationsValue.description: Value reported under deviation type category Compensations / Ersättning

Amount.description: Monetary value of event instance associated with the row

ConnectedDeviationTypeId.description: Identifier for the connected deviation type.

WintSalary.Report.WintSalaryReportRowCol.description: Represents a column in the Wint salary report row.

WintSalary.Report.WintSalaryReportRowLev.description:
Define the levels of the salary report rows.
0 - Level1EmploymentSummary, 1 - Level2SalaryAndDeviationCategory, 2 - Level3DeviationInstance, 3 - Level4EventInstance

WintSalary.Report.WintSalaryState.description:
Represents the state of a monthly salary in the processing workflow.
0 - Preliminary, 1 - Approved, 2 - NotApprovedInTime, 3 - AgiCreated, 4 - AgiSigned, 5 - Booked

Week.description: Used to keep track of sort order

Monday.description: Expected minutes of work for Monday

Tuesday.description: Expected minutes of work for Tuesday

Wednesday.description: Expected minutes of work for Wednesday

Thursday.description: Expected minutes of work for Thursday

Friday.description: Expected minutes of work for Friday

Saturday.description: Expected minutes of work for Saturday

Sunday.description: Expected minutes of work for Sunday

TargetGrossSalaryAmount.description: The target gross salary amount to set for the specified person and period.

UseOneTimeTax.description: Whether to use one-time tax calculation.

WintSalary.TargetGrossSalaryUpdateReques.description: Request model for updating the target gross salary amount for a person in a specific salary period.

ValidFrom.description: Defines from which date the schedule is valid

WorkRate.description: Work rate for the schedule (e.g., 1 for full-time, 0.5 for half-time)

StandardWorkTime.description: Standard work time in minutes per week

ScheduleWeeks.description: List of schedule weeks defining daily work minutes for each week

GrossSalaryChangeEnabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gross salary changes are enabled for the company.

WintSalary.WintSalaryCompanySettings.description: Represents company-specific settings for salary management functionality.

MonthlySalaryAmount.description: The monthly salary amount (effective gross salary for the month).

TaxTableMinimumAmount.description: Minimum target gross salary amount using tax table calculation.

OneTimeTaxMinimumAmount.description: Minimum target gross salary amount using one-time tax percentage calculation.

WintSalary.WintSalaryMinimumTargetGrossS.description: Result containing the minimum target gross salary amount for a person in a specific salary period.

WintSalary.WintSalaryOptionallyRequiredF.description:
Optionally required fields in Wint Salary system
1 - VacationDays, 2 - VacationCompensation, 4 - Schedule, 8 - MonthlyGrossSalary, 16 - HourlyGrossSalary

VacationCompensation.description:
Vacation compensation
For monthly salaries, this is typically between 0.0043 and 0.01 (0.43-1%).
For hourly employed, this is typically between 0.12 and 0.14 (12-14%).

HourlySalary.description:
Hourly gross salary. Null means the employee has no hourly rate.
Only present when the salary type uses hourly gross salary in event calculations.

TaxPercentage.description: Percentage tax for the employee. If set it overrides the tax table.

WintSalary.WintSalarySpecificSettings.description: Settings specific to Wint Salary system

TargetGrossSalaryAmount.description: The calculated target gross salary amount.

TotalCostForCompany.description: The total cost for the company.

RemainingNetAmount.description: The remaining net amount to be paid out.

AlreadyPaidOutNetAmount.description: The already paid out net amount.

FirstPossibleScheduleChangeDate.description:
The first date when a schedule change can take effect
This will be set to the 1:st of the current month, or the date when the last schedule started if that was later.

WintSalary.WorkSchedule.description: Represents a work schedule with validity period, weekly schedules and the first possible date for a schedule change
